data.content: Planning complete. Implementation should start by separating canonical Knots identity from display labels in `src/lib/agent-identity.ts`, then thread the resulting canonical fields through lease creation and claim/poll callers in the execution backend and terminal-manager paths. Verification should cover agent identity normalization plus representative Claude, Codex, and OpenCode lease/claim/poll fixtures in the existing Knots, execution-backend, terminal-manager, and local-worker tests. No child knots were created during planning.
